text.title: AR Design Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

conclusion.verdict: use platform-native anchoring + grammar; enable occlusion APIs
lock cross-platform grammar; respect hit-test limitations
marker AR — different patterns; route to a marker-specific guide

example.trace: ARKit handheld furniture app → anchor-or-plane-required → plane anchoring + occlusion enabled

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
